Grandma's Kitchen Blog

My Grandmother's Banana Bread

This recipe has been in my family for three generations. It's moist, not too sweet, and comes together in one bowl. Serves 8.

Ingredients

  • 3 ripe bananas, mashed
  • 1/3 cup melted butter
  • 3/4 cup sugar
  • 1 egg, beaten
  • 1 tsp vanilla extract
  • 1 tsp baking soda
  • pinch of salt
  • 1 1/2 cups flour

Directions

  1. Preheat oven to 350F and grease a loaf pan.
  2. Mix mashed banana with melted butter.
  3. Stir in sugar, egg, and vanilla.
  4. Sprinkle baking soda and salt over the mixture, stir in.
  5. Add flour, mix until just combined.
  6. Pour into pan and bake 50-60 minutes.

Let cool before slicing. Enjoy with a cup of tea!
